name: Steps to Take After a Forklift Loading Dock Fall

step.name: Step 1
step.text: After a forklift crash, secure the scene and take photos of the equipment and floor conditions. Report the injury to your manager so there's an official record. Next, get a full medical check-up, even if you feel okay—adrenaline can hide pain. Finally, talk to a lawyer before signing any statements for the insurance company. This ensures your rights stay protected from day one.

description: Steps to Take After a Forklift Loading Dock Fall - Boise, West Valley City, West Jordan, Sandy, Murray, Millcreek, South Salt Lake, North Salt Lake, Bountiful, Midvale, Taylorsville, Cottonwood Heights, Holladay, Draper, Riverton, Farmington, Centerville
